name: feishu
description: Connect to Feishu Open Platform for user lookup, chat discovery, message reading, and bot message sending.

interface.longDescription: Connect a Feishu custom app to look up users, inspect chats and recent chat messages, and send bot messages through Feishu Open Platform APIs.
defaultPrompt: Find a Feishu user by email and send a message
List Feishu chats or read recent messages from a chat

connectors.name: Feishu Open Platform
connectors.description: Local MCP connector for Feishu Open Platform APIs.
permissions: Stores the Feishu app secret in connector credential storage.
Sends HTTPS requests to the configured Feishu Open Platform base URL.
Can read Feishu contact, chat, and message data allowed by the app permissions.
Can send bot messages when the user explicitly requests a send operation.

configFields.label: Feishu app ID
configFields.description: App ID from your Feishu custom app.

credential.label: Feishu app secret
credential.description: App Secret from your Feishu custom app.

tools.name: feishu_test_auth
tools.title: Test Feishu Auth
tools.description: Validate Feishu app credentials by fetching a tenant access token.

tools.name: feishu_lookup_user_ids
tools.title: Lookup Feishu Users
tools.description: Resolve Feishu user IDs from email addresses or mobile numbers.

tools.name: feishu_list_chats
tools.title: List Feishu Chats
tools.description: List chats visible to the Feishu app.

tools.name: feishu_get_chat
tools.title: Get Feishu Chat
tools.description: Read details for one Feishu chat.

tools.name: feishu_list_messages
tools.title: List Feishu Messages
tools.description: Read recent messages from a Feishu chat.

tools.name: feishu_send_text
tools.title: Send Feishu Text
tools.description: Send a text message through the Feishu bot.

tools.name: feishu_send_message
tools.title: Send Feishu Message
tools.description: Send a Feishu bot message with a supported message type and content object.

installReview: Requires a Feishu custom app ID and app secret.
The Feishu app must be granted the Open Platform permissions needed by the selected tools.
Sending messages requires the bot to be available to the target user or chat.
